subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Your letter dated the 5th of Dhi'l-Qa'dih 1324 was received, bearing the address "O 'Abdu'l-Bahá" [3.5s]... ...We have previously written and sent out a detailed letter regarding the education of children in faith, certitude, learning and spiritual knowledge, and their being taught to call upon the Heavenly Kingdom with suppliant hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب مورخه ۵ ذی القعده ۱۳۲۴ رسید ای بنده جمال ابهی عنوان نامه یا عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @education of children; moral education, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
